title: INNER JOIN with Subquery produces mal errors
poc: CREATE TABLE table2 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, 2 AS b FROM table1) t1 INNER JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.b = t2.b);
CREATE TABLE table3 (a INTEGER, b INTEGER);
INSERT INTO table3(a,b) (SELECT a, 2 AS b FROM table1);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT a, b FROM table3) t1 INNER JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.b = t2.b);
key_bug_features: INNER JOIN with subquery on non-matching columns
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table4 (x INTEGER, y VARCHAR(10));
SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, LENGTH(y) AS len FROM table4) t1 INNER JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.len = t2.b);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT x, 3 AS b FROM table4) t1 INNER JOIN table2 t2 ON (t1.b = t2.b);
